title: 1000 Pesos

obverse.description:
Portrait of Ignacio Carrera Pinto at center, issuer name at bottom, face value in numbers on top left and lower right corners, in letters on top right corner, transparent window on right, with portrait as watermark, signatures on lower left, raised design for visual impaired on bottom left corner.

Retrato de Ignacio Carrera Pinto al centro, nombre del emisor abajo, valor facial en números en esquinas superior izquierda e inferior derecha, en letras arriba derecha, ventana transparente on retrato como marca de agua, firmas abajo a la izquierda, marca en relieve para discapacitados visuales en esquina inferior izquierda.
obverse.lettering:
1000
MIL
PESOS
PRESIDENTE
GERENTE GENERAL
1000
IGNACIO CARRERA PINTO 1848-1882
BANCO CENTRAL DE CHILE 1000
obverse.lettering_translation:
1000 
One thousand Pesos
President, General Manager
1000
Ignacio Carrera Pinto 1848-1882
Central 
Bank of Chile 1000

reverse.description:
Image of Torres del Paine National Park at center, issuer name on bottom left, face value in numbers on top left and lower right corners, serial numbers black with two prefix letters on top left, horizontal, and to right, vertical. Copyright mark and issuing year on lower right.

Imagen del Parque Nacional Torres del Paine al centro, nombre del emisor abajo izquierda, valor facial en números arriba izquierda y abajo derecha, números de serie negro con dos letras de prefijo arriba izquierda horizontal y derecha, vertical, derechos de autor y año de emisión abajo derecha.
reverse.lettering:
1000
CJ80430317
CJ80430317
PARQUE NACIONAL TORRES DEL PAINE
© BANCO CENTRAL DE CHILE 2018
BANCO CENTRAL DE CHILE 1000
reverse.lettering_translation:
1000
Torres del Paine (Paine towers) National Park
© Central Bank of Chile 2018
Central Bank of Chile 1000

comments:
Additional security features:
- Micro printing repeated "BANCO CENTRAL DE CHILE" and "MIL PESOS" on corners zones of obverse,
- Micro printing repeated "MIL PESOS" rotated, vertical on reverse, between image and transparent window; several lines repeated "MIL PESOS" on right of reverse,
- Perfect matching see-thru sun-like design, with 7 curved rays on lower left (obverse),
- Perfect matching cut numbers "1000" on lower right (obverse)

UV activity:


© gyoschak

 

NOTE: From 2014 to the present, the serial number begins with the last digit of the year of printing, for example in 2018 it begins with AA8…

watermark.description: Transparent window with portrait of Ignacio Carrera Pinto, double line on left, top and bottom of portrait, numerals "1000" repeated 7 times, with different positions, on left and bottom of window.
